content:
🔥 3dsvg | TypeScript
🎯 Primary Use Case: Enabling developers to easily convert static SVG files into interactive 3D components within React applications, and providing a user-friendly visual editor for creating and exporting 3D assets.
✨ Key Features: • Embeddable `` React component • Visual editor for designing 3D objects from SVGs • Multiple input methods (Text, Pixel Editor, SVG Code, File Upload) • 10 material presets and procedural/custom textures • 7 animation options
📖 Summary: 3dsvg is a monorepo providing a React component for creating interactive 3D visualizations from SVGs and a web-based visual editor to design and export these 3D objects. It simplifies the process of turning 2D vector graphics into dynamic 3D experiences.
🔗 Links: • View Project • Homepage ================ 🔓 Open Source
